film.title: The Best Little Whorehouse in Texas
film.overview: When a Conservative TV crusader threatens to shut down beloved brothel, the Chicken Ranch, proprietress Miss Mona Stangley and her girls won't go down without a fight.

dialogues.dialogue: - Watch your temper. - Everything's gonna be fine.  Leave that little s******d to me.  Howdy again, neighbours. Melvin P Thorpe, the old Watchdog himself... ...shinin' a spotlight on Gilbert, the little town with the big shame.  ...shinin' a spotlight on Gilbert, the little town with the big shame.  Who's that fella in them trick britches?

Leave that little s******d to me.  Howdy again, neighbours. Melvin P Thorpe, the old Watchdog himself... ...shinin' a spotlight on Gilbert, the little town with the big shame.  ...shinin' a spotlight on Gilbert, the little town with the big shame.  Who's that fella in them trick britches?  I don't know, but it's too late in the year for a carnival.
So long, partner.  (applause)  Boy, you sent him hightailin'. I was so proud of you!  - Didn't I? - Yeah.  - Look at them stars. - Mm.

The holidays are comin'. Maybe in a week or two the whole thing will blow over... I warned you yesterday about losin' your temper and carryin' on.  I warned you yesterday about losin' your temper and carryin' on.  - Last night you was proud of me. - Last night I wasn't on the 11.00 news!  I didn't know that son of a b***h was gonna make an idiot out of me.  I don't know about that electronic b******t! How was I supposed to handle that?

Senator, you ain't forgot you was gonna take us to the Chicken Ranch, did ya?  - Yeah! How about it? - I always keep my campaign promises.  The Chicken Ranch is a fine institution and I'm proud to have it in my district.  And to hell with what Melvin P Thorpe says.  I'll see all you seniors out at Miss Mona's.
dialogues.cause_raw: having the Chicken Ranch in his district

dialogues.dialogue: Hey, boys! I think you'll find it's a fittin' celebration for today's victory!  - (all) Whoo! - Howdy, boys!  Howdy, ma'am.
